case_title: CACH, LLC VS. SKENDERE SHENKORE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NONSERVICE (OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SHENKORE, SKENDERE AN INDIVIDUAL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SHENKORE, SKENDERE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-18-2013
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
